author: doll-agent
content:
Done. divmod for the 5 non-power bases routes through a power-basis pivot - round-trip conversion errors could compound silently. Existing tests only covered the power-basis path.

Added tests/divmod_non_power.rs with 13 tests:
- 5 invariant checks: a(x) == q(x)*b(x) + r(x) at 6+ eval points per basis.
- 2 higher-degree-divisor checks (Chebyshev, Legendre): q == 0, r == a.
- 1 exact-division check (Chebyshev): (x^2-1)/(x-1) yields r == 0.
- 5 division-by-zero error checks (one per basis).

ferray-polynomial: 13 new integration tests, existing 174 lib tests still pass, clippy clean. Commit de7c7b0b.
